productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Navy Top With Pink Flower Top
description: CompositionNavy blue blouson top made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, ruffled neckline with gathers and flower corsage on collar, puff sleeves with ruffles and rouched hemline Wash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitGet ready to floor the world in this navy blue top from jealous 21. The puff sleeves, gathered neckline and soft blouson top that ends in a rouched hemline all accentuate your feminity. The ruffled details and three rose corsage on the collar are just the final touches to an already lovely top. Team this with simple white pants to don a chic look.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.8", Chest-33"
